name: Dilled Potatoe Salad
recipeIngredient: Garlic (1 clove mashed or 1 tablespoon garlic powder)
Dill weed (2 tablespoons fresh, chopped; 1 teaspoon dried)
Potatoes (1 pound red, cooked and cubed)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large salad bowl, combine the mayonnaise, yogurt, garlic, fresh dill weed, salt-free seasoning blend, and dried mustard.
2. Stir in the cubed potatoes, peas, and chopped green onions.
3. Cover and chill until ready to serve.
